# NiONlite

NiONlite LLC is an independent mobile app studio building focused iOS and Android apps.

Website: https://nionlite.com/
Contact: support@nionlite.com

## Apps

### CUB: Track daily Mortgage rate

CUB: Track daily Mortgage rate is a finance app for iOS and Android that helps users compare published mortgage rates from credit unions and banks.

Primary page: https://nionlite.com/cub-rates.html
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cub-mortgage-rates-tracker/id6761875184
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.NiONlite.bcurates.bcu_rates

Key features:
- Daily published mortgage rate tracking
- Credit union and bank mortgage rate comparison
- One-year mortgage rate history charts for Premium users
- State filters and advanced lender filters
- Favorite lenders and rate drop alerts
- Mortgage calculator with extra payment scenarios
- 7-day Premium trial with no account or credit card required

CUB is not a lender, mortgage broker, or loan marketplace. It is an informational research app that helps users compare publicly available mortgage rate information and confirm details directly with lenders.

Useful CUB pages:
- https://nionlite.com/credit-union-mortgage-rate-tracker.html
- https://nionlite.com/mortgage-rate-alert-app.html
- https://nionlite.com/compare-credit-union-mortgage-rates-by-state.html
- https://nionlite.com/mortgage-rate-calculator-extra-payments.html
- https://nionlite.com/cub-vs-lender-websites.html

### Plate Atlas

Plate Atlas is an AI menu scanner, dietary checker, and restaurant food journal for iOS and Android.

Primary page: https://nionlite.com/plate-atlas.html
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/plate-atlas/id6764467007
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.nionlite.plateatlas

Key features:
- AI menu scanner and dish lookup
- Dietary profile, allergen, disliked ingredient, and custom warning checks
- Saved dishes and restaurant food journal
- Safe-for-me tags and post-meal notes
- Map view for restaurants connected to saved dishes

### ByWhen

ByWhen is a smart deadline reminder app in preparation for iOS and Android.

Primary page: https://nionlite.com/bywhen.html

Key features:
- Adaptive reminder planning based on deadline risk and task duration
- Calendar-aware reminder windows
- Sleep, work hours, workdays, and out-and-away task rules
- Task-specific reminder styles and notification actions

## Site Map

Sitemap: https://nionlite.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://nionlite.com/robots.txt
